import pytest
from source import process_batch

def test_process_batch_processes_all_items():
    items = [10, 20, 30, 40]
    result = process_batch(items)
    expected = [x * 2 for x in items]
    assert result == expected, (
        f"Expected processed list {expected}, but got {result}. "
        "The function is likely skipping the last element due to an off-by-one error."
    )
